creator: yds@dppl.com
text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Yarema
>Organization:	
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	Re: ports/31473: New port: Courier-MTA SMTP IMAP POP3 HTTP mail server suite
>Severity:	non-critical
>Priority:	medium
>Category:	ports
>Class:		change-request
>Release:	FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE i386
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE #0: Thu Oct 4 05:44:54 EDT 2001 i386
>Description:
New port of Courier-MTA SMTP IMAP POP3 HTTP mail server suite. Based
on the latest development snapshot (14-Oct-2001) to make updates to
future versions easier.

Update: Since my previous submission was not committed yet here's an
update. Adds a post-patch target to relocate the creation of *.pem
files from share/courier to etc/courier to be more compient with
hier(7).

Note: This port depends on devel/sysconftool submitted as PR31475
>How-To-Repeat:
cd: no such file or directory: /usr/ports/mail/courier/
>Fix:
begin 644 courier.tgz
